models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal)
    balance = Column(Decimal) # Derived Rule Sum
models.description: Model for Customer with derived balance attribute to sum orders with unshipped items.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    notes = Column(String)
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    amount_total = Column(Decimal) # Derived Rule Sum
models.description: Model for Order with notes and derived amount_total attribute to sum item amounts.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal) # Copied Rule
    amount = Column(Decimal) # Derived Rule Formula
models.description: Model for Item with derived amount and copied unit price from Product.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Model for Product with unit price attribute copied to Item.
models.name: Product

rules.name: Customer Credit Limit Constraint
rules.description: Ensure customer's balance does not exceed credit limit.
rules.code:
Rule.constraint(validate=Customer,
    as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit,
    error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: Customer Balance Derivation
rules.description: Accumulate unshipped order totals into customer balance.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: Order Amount Total Derivation
rules.description: Sum item amounts for an order's total amount.

rules.name: Item Amount Formula
rules.description: Calculate item amount as quantity multiplied by unit price.

rules.name: Item Unit Price Copy
rules.description: Copy unit price from Product to Item.

rules.name: Order Shipping to Kafka
rules.description: Trigger sending order data to Kafka when order is shipped.
rules.code:
Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order,
    calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka,
    if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None,
    with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})

test_data:
Create test data, ensuring that each derived attribute is initialized. Considering derived attributes:
- Customer.balance
- Order.amount_total
- Item.amount (calculated)
- All derived attributes are calculated directly in your test data.
Ensure 4 rows per table with reasonable, demonstrative data.

Import date from datetime for date values.
